title: Acme Robotics - QBR
pr:
**Request:** Bulk CSV export of all meeting data.

**Request:** Configurable dashboard filters by team.
pg: **Gap:** Search does not cover archived meetings.
fs:
**Feature:** Live coaching cards. Active Use.

**Feature:** Mobile app. Interested.
ci: **Competitor:** Compared to a competing notetaker, positive on transcription accuracy.
voc: Acme is an active, expanding user. Wants bulk export and better dashboard filtering.

title: Acme Robotics - Sync
voc: Short check-in. Manager access was the main ask.

title: Globex - Discovery
pg: **Gap:** Reporting export is PDF only, needs Excel.
ci: **Competitor:** Currently evaluating two other vendors on price.
voc: Globex is in active evaluation. SSO and Salesforce sync are gating requirements.

title: Globex - Technical deep dive
pg: **Gap:** API rate limits too low for their volume.
voc: Technical fit call. API limits flagged as a concern.

title: Initech - Renewal
voc: Initech renewing. Happy with coaching, wants branding and better onboarding.

title: Umbrella - Intro
ci: **Competitor:** Incumbent tool is a generic notetaker, no coaching.
voc: Early intro call. Interested in the coaching differentiation.

title: Umbrella - Follow up
pg: **Gap:** No support for their region's data residency.
voc: Umbrella interested but data residency is a hard blocker for their region.
